videos.headline: Penn State beats Iowa as time expires
videos.description: No. 4 Penn State avoids the upset as Trace McSorley finds Juwan Johnson in the end zone for a seven-yard touchdown with no time remaining to give the Nittany Lions a 21-19 win.

videos.headline: Iowa stops Penn State on third down with sack
videos.description: Anthony Nelson gets to Trace McSorley for the sack forcing Penn State to punt.

videos.headline: Penn State forces Iowa safety
videos.description: Shareef Miller tackles Akrum Wadley off the sweep for the safety.

videos.headline: Iowa's Jewell with the INT
videos.description: Josey Jewell picks off the pass from Trace McSorely and returns it down to the Penn State 21 yard line.

videos.headline: Stanley connects with Easley for the Iowa TD
videos.description: Nathan Stanley finds Nick Easley on the back shoulder throw to get Iowa on the board with the touchdown.

videos.headline: Iowa steals momentum from Penn State before half
videos.description: Penn State's defense dominated the first half at Iowa, but the Hawkeyes have the lead after a hard-hitting half.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Iowa steals momentum from Penn State before half) 2017/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Smith-Marsette makes leaping catch for Iowa 1st down
videos.description: Nathan Stanley gets the pass off just before the sack to Ihmir Smith-Marsette for the 1st down.

videos.headline: Barkley reaches for the corner for the TD
videos.description: Penn State RB Saquon Barkley takes the option pitch from Trace McSorely to score Penn State's first touchdown of the game.

videos.headline: Iowa recovers fumble on strip sack
videos.description: A.J. Epenesa gets to Trace McSorley to force the Penn State turnover.

videos.headline: Penn State blocks Iowa field goal
videos.description: Troy Apke gets by Iowa's blockers to tip the field goal attempt.

videos.headline: Wadley goes 70 yards for the Iowa TD
videos.description: Nathan Stanley finds Akrum Wadley who dodges defenders and goes 70 yards to the end zone.

videos.headline: Barkley hurdles defender for first down
videos.description: Saquon Barkley hurdles a defender and takes a hit from another mid-air on his way to a Penn State first down.

videos.headline: Iowa comes back with its own blocked field goal
videos.description: Anthony Nelson gets between Penn State blockers to get a hand on the field goal attempt.

videos.headline: Wadley goes 35 yards for the Iowa TD
videos.description: Akrum Wadley takes the hand off and rushes 35-yards to the end zone for the go-ahead Iowa touchdown.

videos.headline: Penn State wins on walk-off TD
videos.description: Trace McSorley threads the needle to Juwan Johnson for the game winning touchdown as time expires.

videos.headline: Iowa stops Penn State on 4th down
videos.description: The pass from Trace McSorley goes through the hands of Brandon Polk to force the turnover on downs.

videos.headline: Young Hawkeyes talks about his view from children's hospital
videos.description: Iowa football fan Kaden Kelso discusses his battle with cancer, as well as the visits from Hawkeye's players all from the view of the Iowa children's hospital.

videos.headline: Iowa fans wave to children in hospital
videos.description: Hawkeyes fans continue their newest tradition by waving to the children overlooking the field from the hospital.

videos.headline: Franklin confident Penn State still a 2nd-half team
videos.description: Penn State head coach James Franklin talks about the late turnover and touchdown from Iowa and how his team will respond in the 2nd half.

videos.headline: Franklin and Barkley excited after thrilling last-second win
videos.description: Penn State head coach James Franklin and RB Saquon Barkley discuss the drive leading up to the walk-off touchdown to win the game.
